hello.py: Sample project that prints a hello message.
example_project.py: A project example that demonstrates core CS104 concepts.
createDB.py: Users DB project: create or ensure the shared people.db users table.
insert_recs.py: Users DB project: insert or update seed users into the shared people.db.
show_records.py: Users DB project: show all users from the shared people.db.
users.py: Users DB project seed data used by createDB and insert_recs.
users_db_project.py: Interactive Users DB project: create, seed, update, and display users in the shared database.
fertilizer_catalog.py: Search the fertilizer catalog by type, brand, or price. Uses a seeded supplies.db.
fertilizer_editing.py: View or update fertilizer pricing in the shared supplies.db.
tilling_the_soil.py: Interactive fertilizer cost and coverage calculator for multiple sections.
